response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent roles focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have a single early-career C++ role at National Instruments, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or cloud platform development required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with modern web and distributed systems
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Proven track record in agile, test-driven development and CI/CD practices
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development in the last 9 years
Lacks exposure to industrial IoT protocols, SDL, or IEC 62443 standards
Current role and projects are predominantly web/JavaScript-focused, not embedded or high-performance systems
